channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9125] replay-single test_68: @@@@@@ FAIL: 2nd cp failed 1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for parinay <parinay_kondekar@xyratex.com>

Please provide additional information about the failure here.

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/d14c83c8-f2fb-11e6-a0f1-5254006e85c2.

== replay-single test 68: AT: verify slowing locks =================================================== 06:05:04 (1487081104)
CMD: onyx-34vm7 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: onyx-34vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: onyx-34vm8 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: onyx-34vm7 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: onyx-34vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: onyx-34vm8 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: onyx-34vm7 lctl get_param -n at_history
CMD: onyx-34vm7 lctl set_param at_history=8
at_history=8
CMD: onyx-34vm8 lctl set_param at_history=8
at_history=8
CMD: onyx-34vm8 find /sys -name ldlm_enqueue_min
CMD: onyx-34vm8 cat /sys/module/ptlrpc/parameters/ldlm_enqueue_min
CMD: onyx-34vm8 echo 20 >> /sys/module/ptlrpc/parameters/ldlm_enqueue_min
setstripe: unrecognized option '--count=1'
Create a new file with a specific striping pattern or
set the default striping pattern on an existing directory or
delete the default striping pattern from an existing directory
usage: setstripe -d    (to delete default striping)
 or
usage: setstripe [--stripe-count|-c ]
                 [--stripe-index|-i ]
                 [--stripe-size|-S ]
                 [--pool|-p ]
                 [--ost|-o ]
                 
	stripe_size:  Number of bytes on each OST (0 filesystem default)
	              Can be specified with k, m or g (in KB, MB and GB
	              respectively)
	start_ost_idx: OST index of first stripe (-1 default)
	stripe_count: Number of OSTs to stripe over (0 default, -1 all)
	pool_name:    Name of OST pool to use (default none)
	ost_indices:  List of OST indices, can be repeated multiple times
	              Indices be specified in a format of:
	                -o ,-,
	              Or:
	                -o  -o - -o 
	              If --pool is set with --ost, then the OSTs
	              must be the members of the pool.
fail_val=19
fail_loc=0x80000312
fail_val=25
fail_loc=0x80000312
cp: error writing '/mnt/lustre/d68.replay-single/f68.replay-single_2': Input/output error
cp: failed to extend '/mnt/lustre/d68.replay-single/f68.replay-single_2': Input/output error
 replay-single test_68: @@@@@@ FAIL: 2nd cp failed 1

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
